message:
test(e2e): Add moderation and spam control E2E tests

- Add moderation-helpers.ts with test utilities for spam detection and reporting
- Add spam-detection.spec.ts for testing spam prevention via support tickets API
- Add reporting.spec.ts for content reporting flow tests
- Add review.spec.ts for admin moderation queue tests

Test coverage includes:
- Hard blocking of spam content
- Borderline content review flagging
- Legitimate content passing through
- Content reporting with all reasons
- Duplicate report prevention
- Rate limiting behavior
- Admin moderation queue access
- Report processing actions (dismiss, warn, remove, ban)
- Queue filtering and pagination

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
